description_long: This object is a clam shell-shaped bowl with two hinged halves, resembling a natural bivalve shell. The exterior surface is textured with fine, radiating ridges and a slightly matte finish, giving it a realistic, organic appearance. The interior is smooth and glossy, with a pearly white coloration that reflects light softly. The hinge area is visible and appears to be a natural joint, allowing the bowl to open and close like a real shell. The overall coloration is off-white to light gray, with subtle natural striations and shading. The bowl is shallow and wide, suitable for holding small items or serving as a decorative piece.
description: A clam shell-shaped bowl with a textured, ridged exterior and a smooth, glossy white interior. The bowl opens on a natural hinge and features subtle gray and white coloration.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bowl open from above, highlighting the smooth, glossy interior and the natural hinge connecting the two halves.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side angle, emphasizing the ridged, textured exterior and the shallow depth of the bowl.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the back of the bowl, focusing on the closed, rounded exterior and the fine radiating ridges.
description_view_3: View 3 offers another side perspective, showing both the interior and exterior surfaces, as well as the hinge area.
attribute_context_of_use: serving or displaying small food items or decorative objects
